supply_chain.dependencies: The Company relies on local distributors or sales agents in some international locations. If any of these arrangements are terminated, the Company may not be able to replace the arrangement on beneficial terms or on a timely basis.
supply_chain.risks: Reliance on third-party vendors for website and service providers; potential vulnerabilities in outsourced services; supply chain disruptions mentioned in context of client challenges but not specific to Gartner's own supply chain operations.

Compliance with UK Bribery Act
Compliance with Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC) regulations
European Union General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)
California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA)
California Privacy Rights Act (CPRA)
Brazilian General Data Protection Law (LGPD)
Chinese Cybersecurity, Data Security and Personal Information Protection laws
EU Artificial Intelligence Act (EU AI Act)
OECD BEPS 2.0 / Pillar Two global minimum tax proposals
Evolving sustainability regulatory requirements relating to environmental, social, and governance matters in Europe, U.S., and elsewhere
Changes in tax policy including global minimum tax legislation
Heightened scrutiny from various taxing authorities globally
Restrictive domestic immigration laws affecting international recruitment
Enforceability of restrictive covenant agreements due to recent regulatory scrutiny in the U.S.
Government contract compliance requirements including bidding procedures and efficiency considerations
Potential termination of government contracts for convenience or lack of funding
Sanctions compliance related to Russia-Ukraine war and other geopolitical conflicts
Trade restrictions and tariffs
Evolving AI regulations and compliance requirements

sanction_risks: Sanctions compliance related to ongoing Russia-Ukraine war
Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC) regulations
Impact of sanctions imposed by governments or other authorities on international operations
Potential exposure to countries where corruption has historically penetrated the economy
